# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

default:
  interruptible: true

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "dist"
  BIN_DIR: "dist/bin"
  CFG_DIR: "dist/config"
  BIN_NAME: "app"

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p "${BIN_DIR}" "${CFG_DIR}"
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\necho "Running %s (%s)"\n' "${BIN_NAME}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" > "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - chmod +x "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - printf 'commit_sha=%s\npipeline_id=%s\n' "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" > "${CFG_DIR}/app.conf"
    - printf 'Build completed at %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" > "${BUILD_DIR}/BUILD_INFO.txt"
    - ls -la "${BUILD_DIR}" "${BIN_DIR}" "${CFG_DIR}"
  artifacts:
    name: "build_${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}_${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/

unit_test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - test -x "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - test -f "${CFG_DIR}/app.conf"
    - "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - cat "${CFG_DIR}/app.conf"
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: staging
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - chmod +x "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat "${CFG_DIR}/app.conf"
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - chmod +x "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - "${BIN_DIR}/${BIN_NAME}"
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat "${CFG_DIR}/app.conf"
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always
    paths:
      - dist/
